entries.summary: Phase 6 verified ALIGNED with fixes. Task 6.1: fixture files + charmap fixes (full-width ASCII entries, \u2011 non-breaking hyphen, fixture space corrected, full-width test codepoint fixed). Task 6.2: smoke.test.js with improved tests for IPC contract, security config, network blocking, keyboard shortcuts, performance, fixture test. Network blocker regex fixed (extra colon removed).
